title: The Snow Was Black
writer: Luis Saslavsky, Georges Simenon, André Tabet
actors: Daniel Gélin, Daniel Ivernel, Marie Mansart
plot: Upon learning that his mother was a prostitute, Frank (Daniel Gelin) dejectedly vows that he, too, will live a life of debauchery. Part of his self-degradation program is to kill someone, and since the story takes place during the...
